episodes.title: The Doomsday Cult That Accidentally Became a Tech Company
episodes.description:
What happens when a doomsday cult predicts the end of the world… and accidentally becomes a tech company? 

In this video, we dive into the absolutely bizarre story of Aum Shinrikyo, the cult behind the 1995 Tokyo subway sarin attack, who somehow built software for major Japanese corporations, government agencies, and even police vehicle tracking systems — all while experimenting with “spiritual VR headsets” to transmit enlightenment.

Yes, you read that right. This cult literally turned apocalypse prep into a tech empire, undercut every competitor with ultra-cheap programmer labor, and somehow slipped into critical infrastructure without anyone realizing it.
Join us as we roast, unravel, and laugh at one of the strangest intersections of cults, tech, and chaos in modern history.
